# youtrack_custom_field (Resource)

YouTrack custom field resource. This resource manages system custom fields.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "youtrack_enum_bundle" "severity_values" {
  name = "Severity Values"

  values = [
    {
      name = "Critical"
    },
    {
      name = "Major"
    },
    {
      name = "Minor"
    },
  ]
}

resource "youtrack_custom_field" "severity" {
  name = "Severity"
  # YouTrack field type ID: enum[1] means enum with single-value cardinality.
  field_type_id = "enum[1]"

  is_auto_attached           = false
  is_displayed_in_issue_list = true

  field_defaults = {
    can_be_empty     = true
    empty_field_text = "No severity"
    is_public        = true
    # Only one default bundle reference is supported for this custom field.
    bundle_id = youtrack_enum_bundle.severity_values.id
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `field_type_id` (String) YouTrack field type identifier (for example: enum[1], state[1], string). This value is immutable after creation.
- `name` (String) The name of the custom field.

### Optional

- `aliases` (String) Comma-separated aliases used in search and commands.
- `field_defaults` (Attributes) Default project-related settings for the custom field. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--field_defaults))
- `is_auto_attached` (Boolean) Whether the field is attached automatically to new projects.
- `is_displayed_in_issue_list` (Boolean) Whether the field is displayed in the issue list by default.
- `localized_name` (String) Localized name used in UI.

### Read-Only

- `field_type_presentation` (String) Field type presentation returned by YouTrack.
- `has_running_job` (Boolean) Whether a background job is running for this field.
- `id` (String) The ID of the custom field.
- `is_updateable` (Boolean) Whether current user can update this custom field.
- `ordinal` (Number) The numeric order of the field.

<a id="nestedatt--field_defaults"></a>
### Nested Schema for `field_defaults`

Optional:

- `bundle_id` (String) Referenced default bundle ID for bundle-based field types.
- `bundle_name` (String) Referenced default bundle name. Supported as input for enum[1] and state[1] bundle-based fields.
- `can_be_empty` (Boolean) Whether issues may keep this field empty.
- `default_value_names` (List of String) Default values for bundle-based enum/state fields, resolved by value name from the referenced bundle.
- `empty_field_text` (String) Placeholder text shown when the field is empty.
- `is_public` (Boolean) Whether the field is public.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import youtrack_custom_field.severity <CUSTOM_FIELD_ID>
```
